title: podocarpus costaricensis
intro: Podocarpus costaricensis, also known as the Costa Rican yellow podocarpus, is a coniferous tree species native to Central America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Its health benefits include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin conditions, wounds, and infections. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Podocarpus costaricensis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a variety of ailments.
